name: chatgpt-math-normalizer
description: Personal cross-browser extension that normalizes ChatGPT KaTeX display math and boxed math.

scripts.check: node --check extension-api.js && node --check tex-normalizer.js && node --check content.js && node --check popup.js && node test/normalize-tex.test.js && node test/extension-api.test.js
scripts.vendor:katex: mkdir -p vendor/katex && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.js vendor/katex/katex.min.js && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css vendor/katex/katex.min.css && rm -rf vendor/katex/fonts && cp -R node_modules/katex/dist/fonts vendor/katex/fonts && cp node_modules/katex/LICENSE vendor/katex/LICENSE
